name: Crank Hub Failure Risk
description: S58 less affected than S55 predecessor, but the interference-fit pulley design remains. Monitor for timing-related codes. Aftermarket fix available ~£600.

name: Oil Leaks
description: Valve cover gaskets, oil filter housing gasket — most common leak points. Smell burning oil after spirited driving = rocker cover leak onto exhaust.

name: Cooling System Complexity
description: Electronic water pump failures, thermostat issues. Coolant temp sensor failure causes gearbox to hold gears (thinks engine is cold).

name: Auto Rough Shifting When Cold
description: ZF 8-speed can be jerky in first 5 minutes. Usually adapts but persistent issues may indicate fluid or mechatronic problems.

name: Excessive Brake Dust
description: Documented G-series M car defect. Stock pads produce enormous dust and squeal. Ceramic aftermarket pads (£200) solve it.

name: Rear Differential Noise
description: Clunking or whining under load changes. Check diff mount bushings and fluid level.

name: Infotainment Freezing
description: iDrive 8 can freeze or lag. Software updates usually resolve. Check current software version.

name: A/C Pressure Sensor Failures
description: Condenser leaks and pressure sensor faults common. Test A/C thoroughly on viewing.

name: Clutch Wear (Manual)
description: Manual gearbox clutch can wear under aggressive driving or repeated launches. OEM replacement ~£1,800. Check pedal feel and bite point.

name: Excessive Brake Dust & Squeal
description: Documented defect across all G-series M cars. Dust coats wheels within 15 miles. Aftermarket ceramic pads recommended.

name: Steering Alignment from Factory
description: Multiple G80 owners report slight pull or off-centre wheel from new. Check alignment — may need dealer recalibration.

name: Interior Rattles
description: Rear seat and trunk area rattles reported. Trunk seal and wireless charger tray common sources.

name: Headlight Condensation
description: Early production recall for headlight grommet replacement to improve ventilation. Check if recall completed.

name: Door Seal Creaking
description: Weather-dependent creaking from door seals. Gummi Pflege treatment helps. Common across F8x and G8x.

name: Brake Shield Stone Trapping
description: Stones get trapped between brake disc and heat shield causing grinding noise. Easily cleared but annoying.

name: S58 Engine Faults
description: Same oil leak, cooling, and crank hub considerations as M4. See M4 fault list for details.

name: Injector Failures
description: Can cause CATASTROPHIC engine damage. The 5-cyl closed-loop control masks failing injectors. Replace preventatively at high mileage. Genuine Audi only — fakes destroy engines.

name: DSG Transmission Whine
description: Known 8Y issue — high-pitched whine on cold starts, increases with RPM. Linked to DSG pump or cooling system. Can progress to full transmission failure.

name: Transmission Overheating
description: Overheating warnings reported even in cold weather during light driving. May indicate failing DSG pump or coolant flange defect.

name: Carbon Buildup on Intake
description: Direct injection = no fuel wash over valves. Walnut blast cleaning needed at 30,000 miles. Reduced throttle response, rough idle.

name: Mechatronic Unit Failures
description: DSG brain unit can fail. £2,000+ repair. Check for any hesitation or odd shifting patterns.

name: Oil Consumption
description: Higher than average, especially under spirited driving. PCV system faults lead to blow-by. Monitor oil level between services.

name: Haldex AWD Coupling
description: Needs fluid change every 20,000 mi. Neglect = reduced rear traction, unusual noises, front-wheel-drive only default.

name: Turbo Wastegate Issues
description: Under high stress or with tunes. Loss of boost, poor acceleration, check engine light.

name: Seat Leather Creasing
description: 8Y RS3 seats develop premature creases. Cosmetic only but common complaint.

name: Bose Speaker Failures
description: EXTREMELY common on 992. Door speakers blow at moderate volumes. Both sides affected. Replacement ~£300/speaker but recurring issue.

name: Fuel Injector Issues
description: Technical Service Bulletin exists for certain VINs. Check engine light, misfires, rough running. Covered under warranty/TSB if applicable.

name: Engine Oil Leaks
description: Seals and gaskets degrade over time. Check for oil spots, reduced oil level between services.

name: Cooling System Leaks
description: Hoses and seals can weep. Monitor coolant level. Overheating risk if ignored.

name: PDK Rough Shifting
description: Occasional hesitation or jerkiness in low-speed manoeuvring. Software update may help.

name: Lift System Errors
description: Front axle lift intermittently fails or shows errors. Requires engine restart to clear. Annoying but not dangerous.

name: PCM Infotainment Glitches
description: Occasional freezing or lag. Software updates from Porsche resolve most issues.

name: Carbon Buildup
description: Direct injection engine — intake valve carbon deposits over time. Less aggressive than VAG 5-cyl but monitor.

name: Brake Wear with Track Use
description: If car has been tracked, pads and discs wear fast. Check disc thickness and pad life.

name: Air Suspension Failures
description: Bags crack, compressors fail, valves leak. £800-2,500 per corner. Entire system overhaul £4,500+. THE most expensive RR issue.

name: Crankshaft Quality Issues
description: 3.0L diesel had bad casting tolerances in some batches. Oil starvation → bearing failure → snapped crank. Verify batch number.

name: Electrical Gremlins
description: Phantom warnings, infotainment crashes, terrain response failures, battery drain. Often caused by low battery voltage — charge battery first before chasing faults.

name: Alternator Failures
description: Triggers 1-hour system shutdown + kills AGM battery. Need new alternator AND battery. ~£1,500 combined.

name: DPF Clogging
description: Short trips and city driving clog the diesel particulate filter. Need monthly 30+ min highway runs for regeneration.

name: ZF Gearbox Sluggish
description: Without regular fluid changes, shifts become slow and sloppy. 3-4 second delay drive-to-reverse reported on neglected cars.

name: A/C Refrigerant Leaks
description: Copper/alloy pipe corrosion causes leaks. No cold air. Requires pipe replacement.

name: Transfer Case Service
description: Haldex-style transfer case needs servicing every 40,000 mi. Neglect = reduced capability.

name: Interior Rattles
description: Suspension height changes cause bangs and clunks. Interior trim rattles widely reported.

name: Soft-Close Door Failures
description: Mechanism can malfunction. Doors don't fully close or close too aggressively.

name: Door Lock Malfunctions
description: Keyless entry and tailgate can be intermittent. Faulty actuators or wiring.
